_comment: Machine-readable companion to PORT_STATE.md, consumed by PortState.java. A calc path is considered ported iff it appears in 'ported' OR its 'paths' entry equals "ported". At v0.1.3 (Milestone 1) the PlayerVsNpcCalc.accuracy (player attack rolls), PlayerVsNpcCalc.defenceRoll (getNPCDefenceRoll + defence reductions), PlayerVsNpcCalc.maxMeleeHit (getPlayerMaxMeleeHit), and PlayerVsNpcCalc.maxRangedHit (getPlayerMaxRangedHit + getMinAndMax ranged dispatch) paths are ported, so the 3 maxAttackRoll rows, the 3 npcDefRoll rows, the 2 accuracy rows, the 6 plain melee maxHit rows, and the 3 ranged maxHit rows (bofa L99/L1, comp ogre bow) run; the 2 magic maxHit rows (maxMagicHit) and the blisterwood row (distribution) still skip.
